docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUYNH, CUC AS TO DEFENDANT KITAGAWA, MADELINE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-23-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-20-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-08-2005
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR OCT-25-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-25-2005 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LORI CHESHIRE, CSR#12958. (212)
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUYNH, CUC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUYNH, CUC SERVED OCT-24-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KITAGAWA, MADELINE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KITAGAWA, MADELINE JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KITAGAWA, MADELINE
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUYNH, CUC JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR DEC-19-2005. NOV-23-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR JOHN DENNIS HOURIHAN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-19-2005 THROUGH MAR-19-2006.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-18-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR JOHN D. HOURIHAN

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-14-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. APR-18-2006 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUYNH, CUC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KITAGAWA, MADELINE $1,180.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,180.50, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF(S), ACCORDING TO PROOF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUYNH, CUC AS TO DEFENDANT KITAGAWA, MADELINE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-14-2006, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
